prompts.prompt: Build a media gallery that mixes images and videos. Clicking any item opens a lightbox viewer. Videos should show native playback controls. Images should support zoom on double-click.
Build a checkout flow: cart summary → shipping → payment → confirmation
Like Notion's page header with icon picker and cover image
Show a dashboard widget with loading → error → data states
Display a list of services with their current status. Each service should show a status dot (green for healthy, yellow for degraded, red for down) next to the service name and last checked time.
Navigation that collapses to hamburger on mobile
Build a quantity selector for a shopping cart item. It should have a number input with increment/decrement, min of 1, max of 99. Changing the quantity should call an update API endpoint.
Set up the root layout for a new internal tool. Include proper body styling, theme provider with neutralTheme, and a layout with header and main content area.
Show a page title with a short description underneath

Build a settings page where users can customize the app's appearance. Include controls for accent color, border radius, and spacing scale. Changes should apply via the Astryx theme system, not inline styles.
